text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the westside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, condition, GLA, room count, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 0.5% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.
